pi_items.source: Task description and setup_openbci.sh confirm this filename is used for the reformatted PhysioNet S001R04 data.
Task description and export_result.sh explicitly specify and check for this screenshot path.
Task description explicitly requires 2.0x speed, and verifier.py evaluates against this requirement.
Task description requires Looping to be enabled, and verifier.py evaluates the presence of active loop mode.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real EEG data from the PhysioNet EEG Motor Movement/Imagery Dataset (eegmmidb 1.0.0), specifically Subject S001 Run 04, which has been reformatted into the OpenBCI TXT format as 'OpenBCI-EEG-S001-MotorImagery.txt'. The task correctly requires configuring playback speed to 2.0x and enabling Looping mode. The final screenshot must be saved exactly to '/home/ga/Documents/OpenBCI_GUI/Screenshots/playback_review_config.png'.
